ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "src" TEXT /* Image source, same as native */,
  "fit" TEXT /* Indicate how the image should be resized to fit its container, same as object-fit */,
  "alt" TEXT /* Native alt */,
  "referrer_policy" TEXT /* Native referrerPolicy */,
  "lazy" INTEGER /* Whether to use lazy load */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image format */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image size */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image source */,
  "compression_algorithm" TEXT /* Compression algorithm used */,
  "original_size" INTEGER /* Original file size in bytes */,
  "optimized_size" INTEGER /* Optimized file size in bytes */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the image */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES image_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_src FOREIGN KEY ("src") REFERENCES image_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES image_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the image source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the image source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the image format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the image format */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the image format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the image size */,
  "size_width" INTEGER /* Width of the image size */,
  "size_height" INTEGER /* Height of the image size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the image album */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* Description of the image album */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the album */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the album was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_albums_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_albums_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_galleries" (
  "gallery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image gallery */,
  "gallery_name" TEXT /* Name of the image gallery */,
  "gallery_description" TEXT /* Description of the image gallery */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gallery */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the gallery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gallery was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gallery was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gallery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_galleries_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_galleries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image comment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_comments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image rating */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_ratings_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image share */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the image */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the image was shared */,
  "share_method" TEXT /* Method of sharing (e.g., email, social media) */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL used for sharing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_shares_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being tracked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the image */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the image */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the image */,
  "average_load_time" REAL /* Average load time of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analytics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image that caused the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the error occurred */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the error has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_errors_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_errors_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caching" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being cached */,
  "cache_date" TEXT /* Date the cache was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the cache expires */,
  "cached_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cached the image */,
  "cached_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cached image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caching_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caching_cached_by FOREIGN KEY ("cached_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
